{{Quote|You, you bastard! It's that ghost telling you to give it to him instead, isn't it?! I will get my revenge. Mark my words!|Pwwoz Pwwa|<ref name="SWG:Bags" />}}
'''Pwwoz Pwwa''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Geologist/Legends|geologist]] who was present at the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].

During his travels around the [[Magma/Legends|lava]] [[Planet/Legends|world]], Pwwoz found a strange [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] and then later claimed to have seen the [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] of an [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|old Human]] and wasn't sure what happened to him after that as he became possessed by the powers of the crystal. When Pwwoz lost the crystal, he requested that a passing [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] retrieve it for him. Upon the spacers return with the crystal, Pwwoz took and smashed it on the ground, taunted the spirit, and attempted to kill the confused spacer. When the spacer subdued Pwwoz, who later recovered and apologized for his actions, they took a shard of the crystal for themselves.

==Behind the scenes==
Pwwoz Pwwa was a non-playable character in the massively-multiplayer online roleplaying game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. He was added to the game, along with the planet Mustafar in the expansion ''Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan'', which was released in late [[2005]].
